conservative.name: Sleep of Rhya
conservative.requirements:
7 favour.
You invoke this blessing as you settle in to sleep for the night. It recharges at sunrise

success.description: The mother goddess comforts you as you slumber. If you sleep through the night without being disturbed, you and all allies who sleep within close range of you recover 1 additional normal wound and may add to your Recovery checks

reckless.name: Wakefulness of Taal
reckless.requirements:
7 favour.
You invoke this blessing as you settle in to sleep for the night. It recharges at sunrise

success.description: Taal the hunter makes you vigilant while you rest. While you slumber, you and all your sleeping allies within close range may add to your Observation and Discipline checks. If a successful check awakens you, you lose the bonus until you return to sleep

bane.description: If awakened during the night, all targets wake up with 1 stress and 1 fatigue
